message:
Command `echo "=== $(date) ==="
echo "Synthesis done! 90,977 cells, 1,197,678 µm² chip area (43.34% sequential)"

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo ""
echo "=== Run directory (all steps) ==="
ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== LR process 234246 cmdline ==="
cat /proc/234246/cmdline 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' ' '
echo ""

echo ""
echo "=== What's running now? ==="
pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" && echo "LR: running" || echo "LR: DONE"
pgrep -f "yosys" | xargs ps -o pid,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan,comm -p 2>/dev/null | grep -v grep | head -5
pgrep abc && echo "ABC: running" || echo "ABC: none"
pgrep openroad && echo "OpenROAD: running" || echo "OpenROAD: none"` executed with exit code 0.

message.content: Synthesis is complete with **0 problems**. Now checking what the new LibreLane process (234246) is doing and whether it's a continuation of the wrapper run.

echo "Synthesis done! 90,977 cells, 1,197,678 µm² chip area (43.34% sequential)"

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== Fri May 29 10:35:48 +04 2026 ===
Synthesis done! 90,977 cells, 1,197,678 µm² chip area (43.34% sequential)

=== Run directory (all steps) ===
total 192
drwxr-xr-x 3 user user   4096 May 29 10:34 02-yosys-synthesis
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user    903 May 29 10:08 flow.log
drwxr-xr-x 2 user user   4096 May 29 10:08 01-yosys-jsonheader
drwxr-xr-x 2 user user   4096 May 29 10:07 tmp
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user 176805 May 29 10:07 resolved.json
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user      0 May 29 10:07 error.log
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user      0 May 29 10:07 warning.log

=== LR process 234246 cmdline ===
/bin/bash -l -c cd '/workspace' >/dev/null 2>&1 && set -a; [ -f /etc/environment ] && . /etc/environment >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; set +a; export PDK_ROOT=${PDK_ROOT:-/nc/apps/pdk}; export NC_LIB_ROOT=${NC_LIB_ROOT:-/nc/apps}; export NC_SOCGEN_ROOT=${NC_SOCGEN_ROOT:-/nc/apps/nc_socgen}; export PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT=${PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT:-/nc/apps/padframe-gen}; export NC_RV32_ROOT=${NC_RV32_ROOT:-/nc/ip/nc_rv32/v1.1.0}; export NC_AMBA_ROOT=${NC_AMBA_ROOT:-/nc/ip/nc_amba/v1.1.0};  (# Long wait - check every 20 minutes for up to 5 hours
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 1200   # 20 minutes
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  MAIN_LINES=$(wc -l < "$MAIN_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR:-DONE} | step=$STEP | synth_lines=$LINES | $YTAIL"
  [ -z "$LR" ] && { echo "=== DONE ==="; break; }
done

echo ""
echo "Final run directory contents:"
ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
echo ""
echo "Last 50 lines of wrapper_run.log:"
tail -50 "$MAIN_LOG") 

=== What's running now? ===

ABC: none
OpenROAD: none
